name: ontos-protocol
description: AI-native structured text protocol for project context.

scripts.build: npm run docs:build && node scripts/build-viewer-app.mjs && node scripts/build-vscode-extension.mjs && node scripts/build-obsidian-plugin.mjs
scripts.test: node packages/parser/test/conformance.test.js && node packages/schema/test/schema.test.js && node packages/cli/test/cli.test.js && node packages/viewer/test/viewer.test.js
scripts.validate:conformance: node packages/parser/test/conformance.test.js && node packages/cli/test/cli.test.js && node packages/viewer/test/viewer.test.js
scripts.release:check: npm run public-surface:scan && npm run security:secrets && npm run security:audit && npm run security:licenses && npm run validate:security-automation && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run format && npm run validate:json && npm run validate:links && npm run validate:assets && npm run validate:ast && npm run validate:ast-consumers && npm run validate:conformance && npm run test:fuzz && npm run test:path && npm run test:cross-platform-cli && npm run test:vscode-local-install && npm run test:ordering && npm run test:performance && npm run test:viewer-browser && npm run test:coverage && npm run validate:examples && npm run validate:vscode && npm run validate:obsidian && npm run validate:extensions-package && npm run validate:runtime-compat && npm run build && npm run release:archives && npm run demo:video && npm run release:commands && npm run release:verify-commands && npm run project:commands && npm run community:commands && npm run launch:content && npm run validate:website && npm run validate:viewer-app && npm run validate:deployment && npm run validate:accessibility && npm run test:screen-reader && npm run validate:visual-regression && npm run validate:release-artifacts && npm run validate:release-archives && npm run validate:demo-video && npm run validate:external-release && npm run validate:external-commands && npm run validate:release-verify-commands && npm run validate:project-commands && npm run validate:launch-content && npm run validate:launch-ops && npm run validate:community-readiness && npm run validate:community-commands && npm run validate:github-community && npm run validate:release-approval && npm run package:smoke && npm run publish:dry-run
